       2dc84:	f80c 5004 	strb.w	r5, [ip, r4]

       2dc88:	465c      	mov	r4, fp

       2dc8a:	e77f      	b.n	2db8c <print_integer+0x210>

       2dc8c:	4651      	mov	r1, sl

       2dc8e:	2e00      	cmp	r6, #0

       2dc90:	d0b7      	beq.n	2dc02 <print_integer+0x286>

       2dc92:	e75d      	b.n	2db50 <print_integer+0x1d4>

    
out_wrapped_function (12)
